name: I Became the Main Role of a BL Drama
original_name: BLドラマの主演になりました
overview: Yuichiro Akafuji and Hajime Aoyagi are cast as co-leads in a BL manga adaptation and move in together for publicity, but Akafuji remains distant.

trailers.title: lines are blurred between acting and real feelings in J-BL "I Became the Main Role of a BL Drama"
